description: The HR department has finished the annual benefits open enrollment. Several employees submitted paperwork to add family members to their health insurance plans. The open enrollment memo containing the dependent details has been placed on the Desktop at ~/Desktop/open_enrollment_2026.txt. Review the memo and update the Sentrifugo HRMS by adding the appropriate dependent records for each specified employee. Be sure to carefully read any handwritten notes or annotations from the HR Director in the memo, as some entries may be invalid and should NOT be entered into the system.
